item.title: Mahon — Right to Rock
item.description: Author: Maureen Mahon Title: Right to Rock: The Black Rock Coalition and the Cultural Politics of Race Year: 2004 Type: Academic book (Duke University Press) An ethnography of the Black Rock Coalition, the New York collective founded in 1985 by guitarist Vernon Reid, writer Greg Tate, and producer K...

item.title: George Harrison
item.description: EraBritish Invasion (with the Beatles, 1963–1970); solo, 1968–2002InstrumentLead guitar, slide guitar, sitar, vocalsGenresRockPop rockFolk rockBandsThe BeatlesTraveling WilburysListenRYM·Apple Music·Spotify George Harrison played as if notes cost money.
